prestazioni: Engine: 13B-MSP (Multi-Side Port) Renesis rotary with billet aluminum apex seals and ceramic-coated rotor housings, paired with a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (1.06 A/R turbine housing) and custom 4-inch titanium downpipe by Racing Beat, supporting 650 WHP on E85 fuel with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU managing sequential twin Bosch Motorsport 0280158802 injectors and a custom dry-sump oil system by Daikin.

Drivetrain: 6-speed sequential Holinger RD60-LW dog-ring gearbox with carbon-fiber driveshaft and OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.18 final drive ratio), mated to a Sachs Performance twin-disc carbon clutch (240mm) and billet aluminum flywheel.

Suspension & Chassis: Full Öhlins TTX46 MkII 4-way adjustable coilovers with spherical bearing top mounts, custom tubular front and rear subframes by AutoTechnic Japan, and AP Racing CP9430-1000 6-piston front / 4-piston rear brake calipers with 380mm carbon-ceramic rotors (Pagid RSL29 brake pads) and Goodridge 900-series braided stainless steel brake lines.
estetica: Aero: Full carbon-fiber body kit by Veilside (Tokyo Auto Salon 2016 spec), including a 2,100mm-wide front splitter with integrated dive planes, GT3-spec rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (adjustable via cockpit switch), and a 1,800mm-wide rear wing with dual-element carbon-fiber construction and 3D-printed titanium wing supports by 9 Lives Racing.

Interior: Full carbon-fiber monocoque chassis reinforcement with a Recaro SPG XL GT3 seat (FIA 8862-2009 certified) in Kevlar/carbon hybrid weave, paired with a Sparco 6-point harness (FIA 8853/98) and a custom MOMO Mod.78 GT3 steering wheel with integrated AIM MXS Strada data display and paddle shifters for the Holinger gearbox.

Lighting & Details: Full LED lighting system by JDM ASTAR (Philips Lumileds chips) with sequential turn signals, carbon-fiber headlight housings by Seibon, and a custom titanium exhaust exit system by HKS (dual 120mm outlets with Inconel 625 construction) finished in satin titanium nitride coating.
